label: disruptive_contrasting
style_positioning: High-contrast challenger narrative emphasizing unmet need and strategic differentiation.
sentence_patterns: 如果继续沿用...，代价将是...。
当...被重构，...就不再是选择题。
这不是小修小补，而是路径级切换。
rhetorical_devices: Use sharp contrast pairs to create urgency
Highlight cost of inaction before proposing solution
Close sections with directional, competitive implications
